individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with college as it has good placements, decent infrastructure, & great facilities.

content.Placements: Almost everyone gets a job somewhere. Most of the time, people choose to work in the hospital itself. The average salary package offered is 1.5 LPA. Companies don't come and recruit in medicine. You have to apply for the vacant positions. All students have to do mandatory internships in the hospital itself. Roles offered are like sitting in OPD and assisting in surgeries.
content.Infrastructure: The college is centrally air-conditioned. The campus is small but it is convenient and comfortable. The location is good with the metro station and mall right in front of the college. The food quality in the mess is good and you can always order food from outside. There's only one table tennis court and intra-college competitions are usually held in Japanese park.

review_content.Placements: There are. Total 100 seats for students in BDS. If you recruit in good government hospital you get 30000 per month or more on your qualification. If you apply for abroad hospitalsyou can earn in lacs per year. They offer internship stipend also of 5000 per month.

reviews_list.review_title: Faculty is amazing. For dental course I would highly recommend this.

review_content.Placements: Our college provides internship of one year under the norms of DCI. During the internship the interns are posted in each department for about 1 month. And 3 month for public health department to emphasize the need of public awareness and educate the public.

overview_faqs.answer: Yes, CSE (full form Computer Science and Engineering) is a good career choice if you are aspiring for a good salary package as a fresher. faqs.question: Can I start a law practice without a Law degree or become a lawyer?
faqs.answer: No, you cannot become a lawyer without a Law degree.You mandatorily need to obtain degrees such as BA/BCom/BSc/BBA LLB or LLB in order to be a lawyer in India. To become a lawyer, one must first complete three-year or five-year LLB from a recognised university and possess degree certificate. Then, they must enrol themselves in local Bar Council of the concerned state and enrolled as an advocate. Within two years of the enrolment, they must appear and clear AIBE in order to be eligible to practise anywhere in India.

reviews.review_heading: I have better experience in my college and I am happy with my college .
reviews.review_text: The college has Wi-Fi and a wide library for students, having multiple books for studying. Classrooms are cleaned and well maintained. It has four labs in a building. And they also take us for an industrial visit. The hostel is very clean, and there was security. Sports areas, games, and mess are all there.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, qualified teachers and good environment for learning.
reviews.review_text: Good facilities are there in library. Wi-Fi is present and the college has good infrastructure. The quality of rooms and mess is awesome. Medical facilities are good. Availability of ambulance is for 24*7. The canteen is hygienic and its food is great. Availability of indoor and outdoor games is proper.

reviews.review_heading: Very nice college campus placement so I suggest admission.
reviews.review_text:
Wi-Fi available library in the hostel not available and classroom in very interested I like this college, well-equipped library and laboratory including various types of machinery and electronic gadgets. Mess in the hostel is average but satisfying
Canteen is available but price of food is slightly high.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely dissatisfied because of faculty members, placements, infrastructure, and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is fine. The parks are well maintained, but if you come to the classroom, there are no air conditioners and the fans also work slowly. The floor is broken here and there. There are washrooms of poor quality. On each floor, there is no access to drinking water.

reviews.review_heading: It is not a good college and it has the worst management.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is average in our college but the classroom is like a hall. There is a noisy environment. There are no air-conditioners and the fans are very slow. They don't work properly so in summer, we have to face a lot of issues. The same condition exists inside the hostels. They are very filthy.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied because of the college management.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. There are four blocks for different colleges. A cafe and ATM are available on the campus. We also have open-air auditoriums. The infrastructure of the college is good as compared to nearby colleges.

reviews.review_heading: All the facilities including medical, sports facilities, extracurricular activities are available.
reviews.review_text: The facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, library, sports facilities and medical facilities are good. The classrooms are good. There is a canteen available on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: One of the worst colleges in North India. Very poor faculty, no placement.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was good. The college has started only 4 years ago, so construction work is going on. The labs were good. The library was also good. The canteen was operated by Biharis. We faced several infrastructure issues during our education period. They are always shifting one lab's computer to another, this library book to another library. If any tool gets broken in the workshop, the incharge used to ask us to buy that tool from the market, with our money. The hostel infrastructure was ...

reviews.review_heading: The college is below average.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is average. There is no Wi-Fi on the campus. The labs are not well-equipped. There are separate boys and girls hostels. Quality of food is below average. Rooms are also not good. The classrooms are average. There is a medical room in the college, but it is of no use.

reviews.review_heading: The best engineering college in Punjab.
reviews.review_text: The college has the best infrastructure compared to the nearby all colleges. They have divided their building blocks accordingly to the courses. They have the best labs with fully equipped equipment. There are the playing games on the ground. They provided almost everything, which needs to be necessary. The building is the best.

reviews.review_heading: With mechanical department, I am not fully satisfied, as the placement is approximately 55%.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good and is sufficient enough to the students, but there are fewer timings of using labs. They will have less IT labs which can be attended when you are free. So, no one is using the labs. Also, the college campus style is good. When you do not pay the fee at the time, they will take your admit card and say first pay your all dues.

reviews.review_heading: Good infra, poor placements in 2013. poor bus service, but cheaper college as compared to others
reviews.review_text:
The infrastructure was good and Wi-Fi was provided. Labs were full of instruments but the food quality was a little poor. 
They don't let us go out of college when we are on the campus, even when the lecture was not there.
You have to take permission from the HOD first.
The bus service was poor as there was no bus service in between the day who wants to go home early.

reviews.review_heading: There is nothing that dissatisfies me.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facilities were top-notch, and classrooms were good. The library had available books related to the course you were pursuing. Wi-Fi facility was also available. The mess and canteen food were average. The medical facilities were available. Sports and games were excellent. The college was well-maintained, and others were also well-managed.

review_summary.college_name: MCE Society's Allana College of Pharmacy Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Wonderful College with good staff and faculty!

content.Placements: I am studying in the third year of B. Pharmacy in Allana College of Pharmacy. The environment of the college is peaceful, and students are very enthusiastic about studies or also about extracurricular activities! The college dean, MS Dr. Kiran Bhise, is very humble and supportive towards students. The teaching or non-teaching staff is also good enough! From seniors, we heard that placements are also good. As I told, I am studying, so I don't know more about placements, but the college is in collaboration with big companies like Cipla, Dr. Reddy's, etc. Overall, the college is good!

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2015

content.Other: Teaching and the facilities are good. Various curricular and co-curricular activities are organized by the college. The campus of the college has very studious ambiance. The teachers are very helpful. Special attention is given to college teacher to better ones. Future job prospects also give great priority to the academic performance of a student. 75 % attendance is compulsory. There are E-boards in every classroom also they have a digital library at the college. The college provides us books throughout the academic year.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Really a good college and campus.

content.Placements: The courses offered here are B. Pharma and M. Pharm. The college provides moderate placements. Although the majority of students opt for higher education. The role of Medical coding is provided in the placements. College has a great network of alumni, so college offers many guest lectures and workshops.
content.Infrastructure: The college has different laboratories for different departments. The facilities of Wi-Fi and classrooms are also there. A seminar hall, conference room, a library and a digital library are also provided to the students. The hostel facility is good and the food is also good there.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied with the separation of students based on gender and with the events.

content.Placements: The students usually prefer to study further, e.g., M. Pharma, Pharma-D, and PhD. 50% usually get placed. Top recruiters are like Cipla. The roles offered in the course are Medical Writing, Quality Assurance departments, and Manager in companies (usually offered after M. Pharm).
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is average. Good Wi-Fi connectivity. Classrooms have projectors. The library is separate for girls and boys, which is a big disappointment, as in group studies, there's no place to study together, and in a university, having a separate library is not preferable.

Application Process 2026

Candidates can go to the officialEmversity School of Hospitality, Kochi - Kaloorwebsite and apply by filling out an application form. The application form has to be submitted with documents and fees. The counsellors will get in touch with the applicants. candidates have to also submit video resume.
